all.en: This briefing outlines our response plan to the current public relations situation.
all.zh: 本簡報說明我方對於當前公關情勢的應變計畫。

all.en: Recent media coverage has raised concerns about a product safety question.
all.zh: 近期媒體報導引發外界對於某項產品安全議題的關切。

all.en: The crisis response team was activated within two hours of the initial article.
all.zh: 公關危機應變小組於首篇報導出現後兩小時內即啟動。

all.en: Cross functional members include legal, communications, product, and customer care.
all.zh: 跨部門成員包含法務、傳播、產品與客戶服務單位。

all.en: An initial holding statement was published on the corporate website this morning.
all.zh: 初步立場聲明已於今晨在公司官網發布。

all.en: The statement confirms that we take all safety concerns very seriously.
all.zh: 該聲明確認我方對所有安全疑慮皆極為重視。

all.en: We pledged a transparent review and committed to update stakeholders regularly.
all.zh: 我方承諾進行透明檢視，並將定期向利害關係人更新進度。

all.en: Product engineering has launched an internal investigation into the alleged issue.
all.zh: 產品工程部門已就所指疑慮展開內部調查。

all.en: Independent laboratory testing has been commissioned to validate internal findings.
all.zh: 已委託獨立實驗室進行測試，以驗證內部發現。

all.en: Customer support teams have been briefed with approved talking points and scripts.
all.zh: 客服團隊已收到核可的對外說法與對應話術。

all.en: Inbound call volume has increased and additional agents have been deployed.
all.zh: 來電量已增加，並已調派額外客服人員支援。

all.en: A dedicated email address has been set up for affected customer inquiries.
all.zh: 已設立專屬電子郵件信箱，受理受影響客戶的詢問。

all.en: Social media listening tools are monitoring sentiment trends in real time.
all.zh: 社群媒體監聽工具正即時監測輿情趨勢。

all.en: Negative sentiment has stabilized after the holding statement was released.
all.zh: 在立場聲明發布後，負面情緒已逐漸趨於穩定。

all.en: Senior leaders have personally reached out to key enterprise customers and partners.
all.zh: 高階主管已親自聯繫重要企業客戶與合作夥伴。

all.en: Investor relations has prepared briefing materials for analyst questions this week.
all.zh: 投資人關係部門已備妥本週分析師問題的簡報資料。

all.en: Regulatory authorities have been notified in line with applicable disclosure rules.
all.zh: 已依適用揭露規範通知主管機關。

all.en: An updated full statement will be published once verified results become available.
all.zh: 完整最新聲明將於驗證結果出爐後公開發布。

all.en: If a recall becomes necessary, our logistics partners are ready to support.
all.zh: 若需執行召回，我方物流夥伴已隨時準備支援。

all.en: Daily war room meetings will continue until we determine the situation is stable.
all.zh: 每日作戰室會議將持續舉行，直到情勢確認穩定為止。

all.en: Internal communications will keep all employees informed of progress and guidance.
all.zh: 內部傳播將持續讓所有員工掌握進度與行動指引。

all.en: Please direct all media inquiries solely to the corporate communications office.
all.zh: 所有媒體詢問請一律統一轉由企業傳播部門處理。

all.en: Thank you for your professionalism and discipline during this challenging period.
all.zh: 感謝大家在此挑戰時期展現的專業精神與紀律。

all.en: Executive leadership will host a town hall meeting later this afternoon.
all.zh: 高階主管將於今日稍晚舉行員工大會。

all.en: Talking points will be distributed to managers shortly before that gathering begins.
all.zh: 主管對外說法將於該場聚會開始前不久發送。

all.en: Please escalate any unusual customer complaints to the response team immediately.
all.zh: 如遇任何異常的客戶投訴請立即向應變小組通報。

all.en: Field sales should pause new outreach campaigns until further notice is given.
all.zh: 前線業務應暫停新一波拓客活動，直至另行通知。

all.en: Our agency partners are on standby to assist with rapid creative needs.
all.zh: 我們的代理商夥伴已待命協助快速創意需求。

all.en: A post incident review will be conducted once the situation has fully stabilized.
all.zh: 情勢全面穩定後將進行事件後檢討。

all.en: Lessons learned will be documented to strengthen our crisis playbook further.
all.zh: 所獲心得將記錄下來，進一步強化我們的危機應變手冊。

all.en: Wellbeing resources are available to employees experiencing additional stress now.
all.zh: 目前感到額外壓力的員工可使用相關身心健康資源。

all.en: Please continue to support each other and lean on your team leads as needed.
all.zh: 請持續彼此扶持，必要時可向直屬主管尋求協助。

all.en: Updated guidance will be circulated by the end of business today without fail.
all.zh: 最新行動指引將於今日下班前確實發送完畢。

all.en: Customer compensation policies have been pre approved for affected purchasers.
all.zh: 受影響購買者的客戶補償政策已預先取得核准。

all.en: Retailers received an official letter outlining our response timeline this morning.
all.zh: 零售商於今晨收到正式信函說明我方應變時程。

all.en: Spokespersons attended media training to ensure consistent and accurate messaging.
all.zh: 發言人接受媒體訓練以確保訊息一致且準確。

all.en: Legal counsel is reviewing all draft communications before external release.
all.zh: 法律顧問正在審查所有對外發布前的草擬通訊內容。

all.en: Manufacturing has reviewed quality control protocols on every active production line.
all.zh: 製造部門已就所有運作中產線重新檢視品管流程。

all.en: Suppliers have been formally notified and asked to support traceability requests.
all.zh: 供應商已正式收到通知並被要求協助可追溯性查詢。

all.en: Independent investigators expect to deliver preliminary findings within ten days.
all.zh: 獨立調查人員預計於十天內提交初步調查結果。

all.en: An external auditor will validate the final report before public disclosure.
all.zh: 外部稽核師將於正式公開報告前進行最後驗證。

all.en: Frontline staff are reminded to log any unusual feedback into our tracking tool.
all.zh: 前線員工請記得將任何異常意見回饋登錄至追蹤工具中。

all.en: Together we will navigate this period with integrity and continued customer focus.
all.zh: 我們將秉持誠信並持續以顧客為核心攜手度過此一時期。

all.en: Between us, my mother called me last night worried because she saw the news on TV.
all.zh: 私下說，我媽昨晚還打給我，因為她在電視上看到新聞很擔心。

all.en: She wanted to know if I still had a job and whether I had eaten dinner.
all.zh: 她想知道我工作還在不在，還有我有沒有吃晚餐。

all.en: Honestly, that kind of phone call reminds me why public trust matters so much to families.
all.zh: 說真的，這種電話讓我想起公眾信任對於每個家庭來說有多重要。

all.en: Please take a few minutes today to call someone who might be worried about you.
all.zh: 請今天抽幾分鐘，打個電話給可能在擔心你的人。

all.en: A quick conversation goes a long way during stressful periods at work.
all.zh: 工作壓力大的時期，一通簡短的對話就能帶來很大的安定感。

all.en: I noticed many of us forgot to eat lunch yesterday because of back to back briefings.
all.zh: 我注意到昨天我們很多人因為一場接一場的簡報，根本忘了吃午餐。

all.en: Skipping meals will not help us think more clearly when the next call comes in.
all.zh: 跳過正餐並不會讓我們在下通電話進來時思考得更清楚。

all.en: I left snacks in the break room and there is fresh coffee until evening today.
all.zh: 我在休息室放了點心，咖啡也煮到晚上都有。

all.en: Please pace yourselves and remember that this is a marathon, not a sprint.
all.zh: 請大家調整好步調，記得這是場馬拉松，不是百米衝刺。

all.en: I am proud to be working alongside such a calm and capable team this week.
all.zh: 能在本週與這麼冷靜又能幹的團隊並肩作戰，我感到很驕傲。
